title: oreocereus knizei
intro: Oreocereus knizei, also known as the 'Giant Ball Cactus', is a species of cactus native to Mexico. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Oreocereus knizei include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into extracts, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
